news.title:
Tata Capital gained 1% ending at Rs.320.45, outperforming Sensex's 1.46% decline.
Intraday surge on 24 March and bearish momentum shift marked the week.
news.summary:
Tata Capital gained 1% ending at Rs.320.45, outperforming Sensex's 1.46% decline.
Intraday surge on 24 March and bearish momentum shift marked the week.

news.title:
Tata Capital faces ₹413.2 cr tax demand for FY18, issued by DCIT Mumbai.
The demand involves TCFSL, now merged with Tata Capital from April 1, 2023.
news.summary:
Tata Capital faces ₹413.2 cr tax demand for FY18, issued by DCIT Mumbai.
The demand involves TCFSL, now merged with Tata Capital from April 1, 2023.

news.title:
Tata Capital Ltd received an Income Tax re-assessment order for FY 2017-18, demanding Rs. 413.18 cr due to short tax credit and interest errors.
The company plans to file rectification and appeals, expecting a favorable outcome, with no material financial impact anticipated.
news.summary:
Tata Capital Ltd received an Income Tax re-assessment order for FY 2017-18, demanding Rs. 413.18 cr due to short tax credit and interest errors.
The company plans to file rectification and appeals, expecting a favorable outcome, with no material financial impact anticipated.

news.title:
Nomura forecasts AI-driven growth in NBFCs, boosting loan efficiency.
Stocks rated Buy include Piramal, LT Fin, Tata Capital by Nomura.
news.summary:
Nomura forecasts AI-driven growth in NBFCs, boosting loan efficiency.
Stocks rated Buy include Piramal, LT Fin, Tata Capital by Nomura.

news.title:
Nomura initiates Buy on Tata Capital with ₹400 TP, citing evolving NBFC landscape.
High-teens to 20%+ loan CAGR projected FY26–28F; ROE to exceed mid-teens by FY28F.
news.summary:
Nomura initiates Buy on Tata Capital with ₹400 TP, citing evolving NBFC landscape.
High-teens to 20%+ loan CAGR projected FY26–28F; ROE to exceed mid-teens by FY28F.

news.title:
Tata Capital Housing Finance Ltd, a subsidiary of Tata Capital Ltd, allotted 1.29 crore equity shares for Rs. 650 crore on March 9, 2026.
This investment aims to support TCHFL's growth, maintain capital adequacy, and debt-equity ratio. TCHFL remains a wholly owned subsidiary.
news.summary:
Tata Capital Housing Finance Ltd, a subsidiary of Tata Capital Ltd, allotted 1.29 crore equity shares for Rs. 650 crore on March 9, 2026.
This investment aims to support TCHFL's growth, maintain capital adequacy, and debt-equity ratio. TCHFL remains a wholly owned subsidiary.

news.title:
Tata Capital issued Rs. 343 crore secured NCDs privately with 7.66% XIRR, maturing Feb 2034.
The NCDs are backed by company assets and hold AAA Stable credit ratings.
news.summary:
Tata Capital issued Rs. 343 crore secured NCDs privately with 7.66% XIRR, maturing Feb 2034.
The NCDs are backed by company assets and hold AAA Stable credit ratings.

news.title:
TATA Capital issues 34,300 secured debentures worth ₹343 crore, maturing on Feb 8, 2034.
Debentures offer coupon rates of 7.66% and 7.6596%, providing attractive returns.
news.summary:
TATA Capital issues 34,300 secured debentures worth ₹343 crore, maturing on Feb 8, 2034.
Debentures offer coupon rates of 7.66% and 7.6596%, providing attractive returns.

news.title:
Tata Capital's board approves ₹650.02 Cr rights issue for TCHFL.
Equity shares will be issued in one or more tranches to the subsidiary.
news.summary:
Tata Capital's board approves ₹650.02 Cr rights issue for TCHFL.
Equity shares will be issued in one or more tranches to the subsidiary.

news.title:
Tata Capital Ltd launches Tata Capital Healthcare Fund III, focusing on India's healthcare and life sciences.
The fund and its General Partners LLP are now subsidiaries, expanding private equity healthcare business.
news.summary:
Tata Capital Ltd launches Tata Capital Healthcare Fund III, focusing on India's healthcare and life sciences.
The fund and its General Partners LLP are now subsidiaries, expanding private equity healthcare business.

news.title:
Leading NBFCs like Tata Capital, Bajaj Finance, and L&T Finance adopt AI for acquisition, underwriting, and servicing.
AI adoption drives business growth and enhances cost efficiency across the lending value chain.
news.summary:
Leading NBFCs like Tata Capital, Bajaj Finance, and L&T Finance adopt AI for acquisition, underwriting, and servicing.
AI adoption drives business growth and enhances cost efficiency across the lending value chain.

news.title:
Tata Capital allotted 12,500 secured NCDs worth Rs. 1,250 crore.
Coupon rate is 7.95% p.a., maturing on Feb 8, 2028 with 728-day tenor.
news.summary:
Tata Capital allotted 12,500 secured NCDs worth Rs. 1,250 crore.
Coupon rate is 7.95% p.a., maturing on Feb 8, 2028 with 728-day tenor.

news.title:
Waaree Renewable secures Rs. 37.96 cr order, while IRFC posts record PAT of Rs. 1802 cr in Q3 FY26.
Ceat Ltd's Q3 FY26 profit reaches Rs. 155.8 cr; Tata Capital's revenue rises to Rs. 5783.3 cr.
news.summary:
Waaree Renewable secures Rs. 37.96 cr order, while IRFC posts record PAT of Rs. 1802 cr in Q3 FY26.
Ceat Ltd's Q3 FY26 profit reaches Rs. 155.8 cr; Tata Capital's revenue rises to Rs. 5783.3 cr.

news.title:
Tata Capital shared Q3 and 9-month earnings audio for Dec 2025.
Audio covers unaudited standalone and consolidated results, per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Tata Capital shared Q3 and 9-month earnings audio for Dec 2025.
Audio covers unaudited standalone and consolidated results, per SEBI norms.

news.title:
Tata Capital's AUM grew 7% QoQ to ₹2.61 lakh crore; PAT rose 18% QoQ to ₹1,290 crore.
Motor Finance achieved PAT breakeven; strong YoY AUM and profit growth excluding this segment.
news.summary:
Tata Capital's AUM grew 7% QoQ to ₹2.61 lakh crore; PAT rose 18% QoQ to ₹1,290 crore.
Motor Finance achieved PAT breakeven; strong YoY AUM and profit growth excluding this segment.

news.title:
Tata Capital reported Q3 revenue of ₹5,783 cr and 9M revenue of ₹16,942 cr.
PAT stood at ₹790 cr for Q3 and ₹2,019 cr for 9M; IPO raised ₹2,100 cr.
news.summary:
Tata Capital reported Q3 revenue of ₹5,783 cr and 9M revenue of ₹16,942 cr.
PAT stood at ₹790 cr for Q3 and ₹2,019 cr for 9M; IPO raised ₹2,100 cr.

news.title:
Tata Capital shares hit a record high after Q3 results.
Analysts raised target prices post an in-line Q3 performance.
news.summary:
Tata Capital shares hit a record high after Q3 results.
Analysts raised target prices post an in-line Q3 performance.

news.title:
Tata Capital Ltd to hold an earnings call on Jan 19, 2026, at 5:15 PM IST for Q3FY26 results.
Key participants include MD & CEO Rajiv Sabharwal and CFO Rakesh Bhatia; dial-in details provided.
news.summary:
Tata Capital Ltd to hold an earnings call on Jan 19, 2026, at 5:15 PM IST for Q3FY26 results.
Key participants include MD & CEO Rajiv Sabharwal and CFO Rakesh Bhatia; dial-in details provided.

news.title: Societe Generale buys 14.33 lakh Tata Capital shares at ₹354.50 each.
news.summary: Societe Generale buys 14.33 lakh Tata Capital shares at ₹354.50 each.

news.title:
Tata Capital Limited sees a block deal worth Rs.50.8 crore.
The transaction involved 2 sellers and 1 buyer.
news.summary:
Tata Capital Limited sees a block deal worth Rs.50.8 crore.
The transaction involved 2 sellers and 1 buyer.
